name: www.sanyo-bussan.co.jp
message: Sanyo Bussan Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company primarily engaged in the development, manufacturing, and sale of pachinko and pachislot machines. Known for its innovation and high-quality products, the company has established a strong presence in the gaming and amusement industry. Sanyo Bussan is committed to providing entertainment solutions that cater to a wide range of players.
